name: Jypsiere leather handbag
description:
Description:
This Hermès Jypsiere 28 is crafted from orange Taurillon Clemence leather featuring palladium plated hardware. The design includes an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap for versatile wear. The front flap showcases the iconic Hermès turn lock closure, which opens to a tonal leather lined interior with a zip pocket and two slip pockets for organized storage.

Details:
Stamp: Square O (2011)
Material: Taurillon Clemence
Hardware: Palladium-plated
Colour: Orange
Size: 11”L x 4.75”W x 8.5”H
Strap drop: 18” (adjustable)
Includes: Dustbag & detachable shoulder strap

Condition: Very Good (B+)
Some creasing and wear on leather and minor scratches on hardware.

Please note, most of the items that we carry have been previously owned. Unless otherwise stated, items may not be in flawless condition. Please refer to our very detailed pictures and accurate written descriptions. Also, pay particular attention to the sizes and measurements.
